71042c5b.description: PM agent — any actionable GitHub state across both repos?

checks.name: in-development-stale
checks.command: threshold=$(date -u -v-90M +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ 2>/dev/null || date -u -d '90 minutes ago' +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ); for repo in sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be; do gh issue list --repo $repo --label status:in-development --state open --json updatedAt --jq '.[].updatedAt' | while read updated; do if expr "$threshold" '>' "$updated" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 1; exit 0; fi; done; done; echo 0

checks.name: unprocessed-requests
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label type:request --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label type:request --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: unprocessed-bugs
checks.command: for repo in sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be; do count=$(gh issue list --repo $repo --label type:bug --state open --json number,labels --jq '[.[] | select(.labels | map(.name) | all(test("^status:") | not))] | length'); if [ "$count" -gt 0 ]; then echo 1; exit 0; fi; done; echo 0

checks.name: backlog-items
checks.command: in_dev_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label status:in-development --state open --json number --jq 'length') && in_dev_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label status:in-development --state open --json number --jq 'length') && if [ "$((in_dev_fe + in_dev_be))" -gt 0 ]; then echo 0; exit 0; fi && bug_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label type:bug --label status:backlog --state open --json number --jq 'length') && bug_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label type:bug --label status:backlog --state open --json number --jq 'length') && if [ "$((bug_fe + bug_be))" -gt 0 ]; then echo $((bug_fe + bug_be)); exit 0; fi && acc_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label status:awaiting-acceptance --state open --json number --jq 'length') && acc_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label status:awaiting-acceptance --state open --json number --jq 'length') && if [ "$((acc_fe + acc_be))" -gt 0 ]; then echo 0; exit 0; fi && bl_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label status:backlog --state open --json number --jq 'length') && bl_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label status:backlog --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $((bl_fe + bl_be))

checks.name: awaiting-human-with-reply
checks.command: for repo in sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be; do for num in $(gh issue list --repo $repo --label status:awaiting-human --state open --json number --jq '.[].number'); do has_human=$(gh api repos/$repo/issues/$num/comments --jq '[.[] | select(.author_association == "OWNER" or .author_association == "MEMBER" or .author_association == "COLLABORATOR")] | length'); if [ "$has_human" -gt 0 ]; then echo 1; exit 0; fi; done; done; echo 0

checks.name: epic-completed
checks.command: for repo in sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be; do for num in $(gh issue list --repo $repo --label type:epic --state open --json number,labels --jq '[.[] | select(.labels | map(.name) | any(. == "status:awaiting-acceptance") | not)] | .[].number'); do result=$(gh api repos/$repo/issues/$num --jq 'if .sub_issues_summary.total > 0 and .sub_issues_summary.completed == .sub_issues_summary.total then 1 else 0 end'); if [ "$result" = "1" ]; then echo 1; exit 0; fi; done; done; echo 0

checks.name: awaiting-acceptance-with-reply
checks.command: for repo in sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be; do for num in $(gh issue list --repo $repo --label status:awaiting-acceptance --state open --json number --jq '.[].number'); do replied=$(gh api repos/$repo/issues/$num/comments --jq 'if length > 0 and (last.body | test("Acceptance Review") | not) then 1 else 0 end'); if [ "$replied" = "1" ]; then echo 1; exit 0; fi; done; done; echo 0

checks.name: bugs-done-no-acceptance
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label type:bug --label status:done --state open --json number,labels --jq '[.[] | select(.labels | map(.name) | any(. == "status:awaiting-acceptance") | not)] | length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label type:bug --label status:done --state open --json number,labels --jq '[.[] | select(.labels | map(.name) | any(. == "status:awaiting-acceptance") | not)] | length') && echo $((count_fe + count_be))

checks.name: epic-no-plan
checks.command: for repo in sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be; do for num in $(gh issue list --repo $repo --label type:epic --label status:in-development --state open --json number --jq '.[].number'); do total=$(gh api repos/$repo/issues/$num --jq '.sub_issues_summary.total'); if [ "$total" = "0" ]; then echo 1; exit 0; fi; done; done; echo 0
